This is a very late reply to the question Kittie had about how the mod works

Some smart nerd did the hard part and decompiled SM64 so I have Mario as a thing I basically copied from SuperMario64 with his real physics, model, and sounds, fed by an actual ROM. I run that inside Get To Work and mirror the game's terrain into Mario's collision world every frame, while an invisible stand in for the original character follows him around so the game still thinks its player is there. So the adding the map would just be playing the rom fully
